title: Lofty handoff complete
body: Lofty Vaulting Summit session handoff complete. No active Lofty claims remain. WS1.3 landed at 87e21125; WS1.4 assignment was deferred because the owner closed this session before new implementation began. Handoff updates made to connecting-oak-resources thread record, repo-continuity, graph-stack plan WS1.3 status, and napkin. I did not stage or commit, and I left Radiant's active WS2.1 commit window untouched.
